title: Restore Cloudflare Wrangler deploy access
description: Local Wrangler authentication is invalid: wrangler deployments list failed with Cloudflare API auth errors 10000 and 9109, and wrangler secret list failed with 401 Unauthorized plus missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. Code is pushed, but deploy/rollback/KV delete actions cannot be performed from this machine until Cloudflare API auth is restored.
notes: Blocked locally: no CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in env or keychain, and Wrangler OAuth token is invalid. Required input is restored Cloudflare login or a valid scoped API token.
close_reason: Wrangler OAuth restored and verified with npx wrangler whoami; Worker deploy succeeded to version 8a1e0dc6-2a7b-4f39-b5fa-9333a486afa4.

title: External secret rotation requires fresh credentials
description: HMAC_CLIENT_ID/HMAC_SECRET were rotated in Cloudflare Worker secrets and the new client material is stored in macOS Keychain service tradingview-worker-hmac account gwizz. Stale TV_SESSION_ID Worker secret was deleted. Production KV auth:session was deleted and verified 404. Remaining blocker: a fresh account-owner TradingView browser session must be posted through POST /admin/session with the new HMAC credentials before authenticated TradingView requests can work again.
close_reason: Fresh TradingView session was posted via HMAC-signed POST /admin/session; stored failure state reset to 0; HMAC-signed POST /v1/candles returned candles for ASX:MQG using the stored session. Residuals filed separately: Cloudflare Wrangler auth is invalid, and /admin/session/status is a false negative despite market-data success.

title: Execute TradingView authority refactor plan
description: Execute the full reviewed plan: tracked worker authority, shared tradingview-core package, agent skill workflows, Worker auth/cache/config/secret hardening, MCP deletion, acceptance verification, commit and push.

title: TradingView WebSocket protocol rediscovery
description: Capture and catalog TradingView data/prodata/history-data WebSocket frame names and payload shapes, including chart, replay, and deep backtesting flows. Compare against packages/tradingview-core/src/constants.ts and worker/src/tv-raw-socket.ts.

title: Authenticated TradingView browser runtime surface capture
description: Capture TradingView authenticated browser network traffic and UI-triggered surfaces for chart load, symbol search, indicators, Pine editor, layouts, watchlists, alerts, screener save/autosave, replay/deep backtesting, news alerts, options, portfolio, and paper trading. Classify auth, plan, network, upstream, and rate-limit failures without downgrading capabilities.

title: Fix admin session status false negative
description: Fresh TradingView cookies validate from this machine against https://www.tradingview.com/ with auth_token present, and HMAC-signed Worker POST /v1/candles returned candles for ASX:MQG using the stored session. However HMAC-signed GET /admin/session/status returned ok=false reason='Wrong or expired sessionid/sessionid_sign'. Investigate Cloudflare/TradingView homepage validation behavior, add a reliable validator, and deploy once Cloudflare auth is restored.
notes: Local source fix implemented: /admin/session/status now validates through getAuthToken(sessionId, sessionSign), getAuthToken includes sessionid_sign when present, and worker test covers that the status route does not call getUserProfile. Verified npm run typecheck, npm test, and npm run build locally. Live deployment remains blocked by tradingview-ew4 because Wrangler Cloudflare auth is invalid.
close_reason: Source fix deployed. Live HMAC GET /admin/session/status returns ok true with failures 0; live HMAC POST /v1/candles returns ASX:MQG candles using stored session.

title: TradingView bundle expansion and route delta rediscovery

Verified with node scripts/validate-tradingview-skill.mjs, pnpm test, pnpm run typecheck, and git diff --check.

title: Review and harden Worker and TradingView skill
description: Audit worker/ and skills/tradingview for robustness gaps beyond the prior authority refactor, implement scoped fixes, verify with repo gates, and keep the Worker/core/skill authority split intact.
notes:
Audit findings (worker + skill robustness):

worker/src/index.ts
- A. HMAC signature compare at line 130 is a non-constant-time string compare; use crypto.subtle.verify so the authority gate is timing-safe.
- B. isAuthError (lines 59-67) substring-matches generic words ("expired", "unauthorized", "forbidden", "sessionid"). A non-auth error mentioning any of these falsely triggers markAuthFailure. Tighten to anchored phrases / 401|403 status codes.
- C. /cache/:symbol/:tf parses query params with Number(x) (lines 251-258); non-numeric input becomes NaN and propagates into cache logic. Validate as finite numbers and reject otherwise.

worker/src/tradingview.ts
- E. getCandles slice math bug (lines 238-240): newCandles.slice(0, -rawCandles.length) collapses to slice(0, 0) when rawCandles is empty (-0 === 0), discarding the entire first batch when TradingView returns more bars than requested. Guard on rawCandles.length > 0 or compute the cut explicitly.
- F. loginUser surfaces TradingView's raw error string into the thrown message; cap and sanitize to avoid leaking control characters / oversized payloads.

worker/src/cache.ts, prune.ts, index.ts (invalidate)
- G. KV list({ prefix }) and R2 bucket.list({ prefix }) calls do not handle cursor/list_complete or truncated pagination. After 1000 metas/chunks accumulate, snapshotMeta, pruneCache, updateTotalsAndMaybeEvict, and /cache/:symbol/:tf/invalidate silently drop the tail — orphaning R2 objects and missing eviction targets.

skills/tradingview/{SKILL.md, auth.md}
- H. SKILL.md doesn't document the partial response field, the authSource ("stored"|"provided"|"none") returned by session-aware routes, or the worker's fail-closed behavior on missing HMAC env.
- I. auth.md doesn't pin down X-Timestamp units (ms epoch), the 5-minute skew window the worker enforces, or that the same HMAC scheme covers /admin and /v1.

Out of scope this pass:
- markAuthFailure read-modify-write race (KV has no CAS; correct fix is moving auth-store behind a Durable Object).
- /v1/auth-token markAuthFailure asymmetry (would need a refactor of the route's auth-token-vs-failure heuristic).
- Engine.IO connect endpoint failure tracking across calls.
close_reason: Worker and TradingView skill robustness pass verified. Closed in-scope audit findings: HMAC verify path preserved, error classification prevents network/upstream failures from poisoning auth state, signed sessions propagate across upstream paths, cache query numbers reject non-finite values, candle batch trimming avoids -0 first-batch loss, login errors are sanitized, KV/R2 list pagination is handled, and skill/auth docs now cover partial/authSource/fail-closed/retry semantics. Verification: pnpm run typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm run build.

title: Close audit gaps and surpass refactor plan
description: Implement 8 changes per /Users/gwizz/.claude/plans/vectorized-cooking-perlis.md: (1) yaml-package OpenAPI validator, (2) move Candle to core, (3) drift absence assertions, (4) cron handler test, (5) fill CLAUDE.md placeholders, (6) document npm install prereq, (7) CI workflow, (8) backtest unit tests in core.
close_reason: All 8 plan items implemented and verified. Migrated to pnpm. typecheck + 18 tests + skill validator + openapi validator all passing.

value: Always prefer pnpm over npm in this project (and the user prefers pnpm globally). Use pnpm install, pnpm test, pnpm run <script>, pnpm-workspace.yaml for workspaces, pnpm/action-setup in CI.
